chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 329 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «حُفُّوا اَلشَّوَارِبَ وَ أَعْفُوا اَللِّحَى وَ لاَ تَشَبَّهُوا بِالْيَهُودِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.329 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said: "Trim your mustaches and let your beards grow, and do not resemble the Jews."
